reasoning: 1. TP Dist: 1061.1 (vs ATR-Ref: 536.038). 2. SL Dist: 588.9 (>= 1.0x ATR). 3. TP/SL Ratio: 1.80 (>= 1.25). 4. Floor Check: Price (64188.9) is above VAL (64109.06), which strictly prohibits a bearish stance. Technical Justification: Despite the strong downward momentum on the 1h chart, the price has found temporary support at the Value Area Low (VAL). The 15m chart indicates a consolidation phase where buyers are defending the 64k level. Given the hard constraint regarding the VAL, a long position targeting a mean-reversion bounce is the only valid structural play. The TP is capped at 2.0x ATR to remain realistic within the current high-volatility environment.
reasoning_zh: 1. 止盈距离: 1061.1 (ATR参考值: 536.038)。2. 止损距离: 588.9 (>= 1.0x ATR)。3. 盈亏比: 1.80 (>= 1.25)。4. 底部检查: 价格 (64188.9) 高于价值区域低点 (VAL: 64109.06)，根据规则严禁看空。技术理由：尽管 1 小时图显示强劲的下跌动能，但价格在价值区域低点 (VAL) 附近找到了临时支撑。15 分钟图显示进入盘整阶段，买家正在守卫 64k 水平。鉴于 VAL 的硬性约束，针对均值回归反弹的做多操作是唯一符合结构的策略。止盈位限制在 2.0 倍 ATR 以内，以确保在当前高波动环境下的现实性。
